allow: Bash(awk '/\\\\begin{algorithm}/{a=1; line=NR} a && /\\\\caption\\{/ {cap=NR} a && /\\\\textit\\{Source/ {src=NR; printf "alg @%d  caption @%d  source @%d \(gap=%d\)\\n", line, cap, src, src-cap; a=0}' methodology.tex)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); p = d['progress']; print\(f'Progress: {p[\\"complete\\"]}/{p[\\"total\\"]} tasks complete'\); print\(f'State: {d.get\(\\"state\\", \\"unknown\\"\)}'\)")
